Whether it’s to support muscle, performance or your body, Amino X EAA’S deliver everything required to help you smash through the most challenging workouts.

name: Amino X by BSN
description_html:
BSN has made a name for themselves in creating some of the most effective supplements in the world. Amino X is no different. It's a highly evolved formulation of branched chain amino acids (BCAAs) and is one of the best recovery agents in existence. This product has been driven through research and development to support protein synthesis, muscle maintenance, recovery and endurance. 

Every athlete's goal is to attain maximum performance, muscular strength and endurance. BSN offers some of the best of ingredients to attain this maximum level.

“For over a decade, BSN has set the bar for innovation in the performance nutrition world,” says Vice President of Marketing of BSN, Kent Cunningham.

BSN boasts some of the world's top athletes using their products such as IFBB bodybuilder Flex Lewis, IFBB bikini competitors Amanda Latona and India Paulino, NBA basketballer Joakim Noah, UFC heavyweight champion Cain Velasquez and Crossfit star Camille Leblanc-Bazinet.

Key Benefits

  • 10g of micronised anti-catabolic amino acids with each hit
  • Absolutely zero grams of sugar per serving
  • 500 anabolic IUs of vitamin D per serve
  • Caffeine-free so it's very versatile and can be used any time of the day/night

Other benefits you may find with this product are glycogen resynthesis, anti-catabolism, muscle sparing, faster recovery from intense training and increased muscular endurance.

The BCAA factor

These are the three amino acids commonly known as isoleucine, leucine and valine, They are metabolised within the muscle and are readily available to aid in muscle recovery and thus combat muscle breakdown. Leucine is one of the most significant anabolic properties and can also activate the so called "mammalian target of rapamycin" (mTOR) that works in regulating muscle growth. 

EAAs

These are L-taurine, L-citrulline and L-alanine. Citrulline is an amino acid that acts to support the formation of nitric oxide whilst taurine assists the uptake of nutrients into muscle and lastly, alanine is converted into pyruvate assisting glucose production in an intense workout.

L-leucine is an essential amino acid that can be obtained by eating meat, dairy products, eggs, and other beans; it helps in maintaining muscle mass; aids in weight loss; increased levels of high density lipoprotein cholesterol (good cholesterol).

L-valine is an essential amino acid for cognitive function; it can be found from leafy vegetables, poultry, milk and kidney beans; it also aids in maintaining muscle and regulation of immune system.

L-isoleucine is a BCAA that goes along with leucine and l-valine promotes tissue repair; promotes blood sugars and energy levels; it also prevents muscle breakdown during an intense training session; increases your energy and endurance levels

L-alanine is an essential amino acid that helps convert blood glucose to energy; for muscle health to reduce fatigue. 

Taurine is an amino acid found largely in the brain and best food sources are meat and fish; it helps in improving anxiety, hyperactivity, and poor brain function.

L-citrulline is a naturally occurring amino acid found in foods like watermelons; it is also used in body building for increasing energy and athletic performance. 

Citric acid will help you clear out free radicals from the body; great sources are grapefruits, lemon and oranges; it also controls acid balance in the body; keeps kidney stones at bay.

Malic acid is an acid derived from plant, most commonly from apples; salt forms of malic acid assist is Kreb’s cycle process of producing energy; aids in digestion, detoxification and aerobic metabolic functions.

Cholecalciferol vitamin D3 is a fat soluble vitamin that helps in absorption of calcium and phosphorus.

name: Syntha-6 Edge
description_html:

Instant oplosbaarheid Syntha-6 edge valt perfect te mixen met elke gewenste vloeistof; zonder klonten. Gewoon shaken of mixen met een lepel en genieten. Neem dan maximaal 2 maatscheppen per dag. V) Voor wie is Syntha-6 Edge geschikt? A) Krachtsporters en bodybuilders gebruiken het voor de eiwitten die bijdragen aan de groei van spiermassa. Ook vegetariërs kiezen voor Syntha-6 als een waardevolle vervanger van vleesproducten. ​​​​​​​*Dit product bevat van nature aanwezige suikers.

name: Syntha-6 Edge Ultra-Premium Protein by BSN
description_html:
If you’re a fan of regular Syntha 6 from BSN, which many people use as a meal replacement powder, you are going to love what BSN has in store now. Their Syntha 6 Edge Ultra Protein product cuts the fats and carbs, delivering you high-quality protein without sacrificing on taste.

Syntha 6 original is often regarded as one of the best tasting protein powders, and many often thought this was due to the added fat and carbs. BSN now proves that wrong. Syntha 6 Edge Ultra-Premium Protein is a protein powder so delicious you have to taste it to believe it.

Now, you can have a great tasting shake even when you are looking for fat loss.

When you use Syntha 6 Edge Ultra-Premium Protein by BSN, you’ll get:
  • A solid dose of some of the best quality protein available, which will also help ensure it’s maximally absorbed into your muscle cells.
  • A low total fat content with hardly any saturated fat.
  • Only a couple grams of sugar, so you don’t suffer from any blood glucose spike when using this protein powder
  • A combination of protein powders so that you get fast as well as sustained release protein, keeping your body anabolic for hours to come.
  • Excellent mixability so you can just shake and go. No blender needed.
  • Delicious versatility. Not in the mood for a shake? No problem. You can also bake with this protein powder or stir it into your favourite foods like yogurt or oatmeal.

Syntha 6 Edge Ultra-Premium Protein by BSN is a protein powder that you’ll try once and then never let go of. It’ll quickly become a staple in your pantry.

In every serving of Syntha 6 Edge Ultra-Premium Protein you’ll take in:
  • 153 calories, which is only slightly higher than comparable whey concentrate protein powders
  • 24 grams of high-quality lean protein, which is on the high end for most protein powders
  • Just 3.5 grams of total fat with just one gram coming from saturated fat
  • 6 grams of carbs with only two grams of sugar. This is fewer than many other protein powders on the market today
  • Only 190 mg of sodium, so this is an excellent option for those who are trying to reduce the total sodium content of their meal plan
  • A combination of whey concentrate, whey isolate, as well as casein protein powder, so you will stop all catabolic processes taking place in the body immediately upon serving this and continue to prevent them for hours to come.

If you’re in the market for a new protein powder, make sure you aren’t overlooking Syntha 6 Edge Ultra-Premium Protein by BSN.

name: Syntha-6 Isolate by BSN
description_html:
Support the long and short-term recovery of your muscles with Syntha-6 Isolate by BSN. The ultra-premium protein blend of Whey Protein Isolate (WPI) and Milk Protein Isolate delivers a combination of fast and slow-digesting proteins, ideal for post workout support.

Immediately after your workout, muscle proteins can break down and reduce the quality of the gains you have worked so hard towards. WPI’s fast-digesting nature offers immediate support to stop muscle breakdown. Milk Protein Isolate takes longer to digest, offering a slower and more sustained support for muscle growth and maintenance. This blend also has a complete Essential Amino Acids (EEAs) profile to support muscle repair and regrowth.

What are the benefits of Syntha-6 Isolate by BSN?

  • 25g of protein
  • 11g of naturally occurring EAAs
  • Support fitness and body goals
  • Delicious range of flavours
  • Any time of day formula
  • Slow and fast protein release
  • Support body composition goals

When should I take Syntha-6 Isolate by BSN?

Syntha-6 Isolate by BSN can be taken at any time of day. To get the best results, it's recommended you take it post workout so the mixture of fast and slow-releasing proteins can support immediate and long-term muscle recovery.

What’s the difference between Syntha-6 Edge and Syntha-6 Isolate?

Syntha-6 Isolate is a two-protein blend of fast-absorbing WPI and a slow-absorbing Milk Protein Isolate. This makes it an ideal post workout protein for immediate and long-term muscle recovery. Syhtna-6 Edge has six different protein sources that digest at different rates. This results in a formula that can be taken before your workout, for sustained muscle gain, energy and output.

Warning: This product is not a sole source of nutrition and should be consumed in conjunction with a nutritious diet and an appropriate training or exercise program. Not suitable for children under 15 years of age or pregnant women: Should only be used under medical or dietetic supervision.

name: True Mass by BSN
description_html:
This supplement has been specially formulated by BSN to build muscle mass at a maximum potential. True Mass is a protein supplement composed of essential ingredients for muscle cells and is ideal for those who need to increase strength and muscle size. True Mass is an ideal complement to the high-calorie diet and its components have the maximum advantage when enough calories and energy substrates are provided through the diet.

Every athlete's goal is to attain maximum performance, muscular strength and endurance. BSN offers some of the best of ingredients to attain this maximum level.

“For over a decade, BSN has set the bar for innovation in the performance nutrition world,” says Vice President of Marketing of BSN, Kent Cunningham.

BSN boasts some of the world's top athletes using their products such as IFBB bodybuilder Flex Lewis, IFBB bikini competitors Amanda Latona and India Paulino, NBA basketballer Joakim Noah, UFC heavyweight champion Cain Velasquez and Crossfit star Camille Leblanc-Bazinet.

True mass benefits:

  • Sustained release of amino acids (8 hours).
  • Combination of multifunctional proteins and carbohydrates for the day and night.
  • Ideal as post-workout.
  • 6 sources of ultra-premium quality proteins.
  • With digestive enzymes to increase the efficiency of proteins.
  • Contains BCAAs, essential and nonessential amino acids.
  • Glutamine and Glutamine Peptides.
  • Source of fiber.
  • Free of aspartame.

What's going on inside?

True Mass possesses a blend of alpha and beta calcium caseinates, high purity isolated whey peptides and ultra filtrated whey. It's got carbohydrates (simple and complex) and a mixture of six kinds of protein. It's also stacked BCAAs in there to round out the blend. 

Whey protein concentrate has shown great ability to promote muscle growth. Whey protein concentrate contain about 80 percent pure proteins. This is a high-quality whey protein concentrate due to a refining process.

Milk protein is complete with all the essential amino acids, in addition to being the richest known source of BCAAs.

Whey Protein Isolate (WPI) has been subjected to a finer processing requirement, thus it is more pure than the concentrate. Thus, this supplement provides with more than 85-95 percent protein. The lactose and fat content is very low and it has a high bioavailability. Due to the BCAAs present WPI slows catabolic muscle activity and increases muscle recovery.

Hydrolysed WPI is enzymatically broken into large peptides giving it lightning fast absorption rates to feed those trained muscles. Hyrdrolysed protein can also help stimulate and boost the immune system by increasing the levels of glutathione, which helps detoxify the body.

Micellar casein  is a sustained release protein because of its tendency to form a gel and release into the bloodstream over time. It represents approximately 80 percent of the protein found in the milk. An ultrafiltration process separates the casein micelles without the use of chemical.
